emails.subject: FW: SDG&E Exhibits
emails.body: FW: SDG&E Exhibits Steve I haven't opened these, but let me know if this is the stuff. Jeff

emails.subject: RE: SDG&E Exhibits
emails.body: RE: SDG&E Exhibits I don't believe these are what I am looking for. The Decision references Exhibits 14, 18, and 38 most frequently, but also Exhibits 9 and 26. I do not see those titles or labels on any of these documents, and the descriptions of their contents in the Decision indicate to me that these aren't the Exhibits. To: Swain, Steve

emails.subject: RE: SDG&E Exhibits
emails.body: I'll have folks get those and forward them. Be back to you soon. Jeff To: Dasovich, Jeff
